intitule: Identification de la Voix Active et Passive

enonce.texte: Identifiez si chaque phrase est à la voix active ou à la voix passive.

questions.texte: The teacher explains the lesson.
questions.reponse: Active voice

questions.texte: The lesson is explained by the teacher.
questions.reponse: Passive voice

questions.texte: The students wrote the essays.
questions.reponse: Active voice

questions.texte: The essays were written by the students.
questions.reponse: Passive voice

enonce.texte: Transformez les phrases suivantes de la voix active à la voix passive au Present Simple. Rappelez-vous : am/is/are + past participle.

questions.texte: The chef prepares the food.
questions.reponse: The food is prepared by the chef.

questions.texte: They clean the room every day.
questions.reponse: The room is cleaned every day.

questions.texte: The company sells high-quality products.
questions.reponse: High-quality products are sold by the company.

questions.texte: She writes the reports every month.
questions.reponse: The reports are written by her every month.

enonce.texte: Transformez les phrases suivantes de la voix active à la voix passive au Past Simple. Rappelez-vous : was/were + past participle.

questions.texte: The police arrested the thief.
questions.reponse: The thief was arrested by the police.

questions.texte: They built this house in 1990.
questions.reponse: This house was built in 1990.

questions.texte: The children ate all the cookies.
questions.reponse: All the cookies were eaten by the children.

questions.texte: She sent the letter yesterday.
questions.reponse: The letter was sent by her yesterday.

enonce.texte: Transformez les phrases suivantes de la voix active à la voix passive au Present Perfect. Rappelez-vous : have/has been + past participle.

questions.texte: The government has built new schools.
questions.reponse: New schools have been built by the government.

questions.texte: She has finished her homework.
questions.reponse: Her homework has been finished by her.

questions.texte: They have planted many trees.
questions.reponse: Many trees have been planted by them.

questions.texte: The manager has approved the project.
questions.reponse: The project has been approved by the manager.

enonce.texte: Transformez les phrases suivantes de la voix passive à la voix active.

questions.texte: The book was written by Chinua Achebe.
questions.reponse: Chinua Achebe wrote the book.

questions.texte: The car is being repaired by the mechanic.
questions.reponse: The mechanic is repairing the car.

questions.texte: The movie has been watched by millions of people.
questions.reponse: Millions of people have watched the movie.

questions.texte: The food was prepared by the chef.
questions.reponse: The chef prepared the food.

intitule: Utilisation de la Voix Passive dans des Contextes Quotidiens

enonce.texte: Répondez aux questions suivantes en utilisant la voix passive. Les situations sont liées à la vie quotidienne au Cameroun.

questions.texte: Comment exprimer que votre téléphone a été volé ? (Utilisez le Past Simple passif)
questions.reponse: My phone was stolen.

questions.texte: Comment dire que les routes sont réparées par le gouvernement ? (Utilisez le Present Simple passif)
questions.reponse: The roads are repaired by the government.

questions.texte: Comment exprimer que le concours sera organisé l'année prochaine ? (Utilisez le Future Simple passif avec 'will')
questions.reponse: The competition will be organized next year.

questions.texte: Comment dire que les plats ont été préparés par les femmes du village ? (Utilisez le Present Perfect passif)
questions.reponse: The dishes have been prepared by the village women.

intitule: Choix du Temps Verbal Correct à la Voix Passive

enonce.texte: Lisez les situations suivantes et choisissez le temps verbal correct à la voix passive.

questions.texte: Le président va donner un discours demain. (Utilisez le Future Simple passif)
questions.reponse: A speech will be given by the president tomorrow.

questions.texte: Les élèves préparent l'exposition en ce moment. (Utilisez le Present Continuous passif)
questions.reponse: The exhibition is being prepared by the students.

questions.texte: Les devoirs étaient en train d'être faits quand je suis arrivé. (Utilisez le Past Continuous passif)
questions.reponse: The homework was being done when I arrived.

questions.texte: Le projet sera terminé avant la fin du mois. (Utilisez le Future Perfect passif)
questions.reponse: The project will have been completed before the end of the month.

intitule: Rédaction d'un Article avec la Voix Passive

enonce.texte:
Vous êtes journaliste pour un journal camerounais. Rédigez un article en utilisant la voix passive pour décrire les événements suivants.

Situation : Une nouvelle école a été construite dans votre village. Les matériaux ont été fournis par une ONG. Les élèves seront sélectionnés par le directeur. Les cours débuteront en septembre.

questions.texte: Rédigez un paragraphe décrivant la construction de l'école. (Utilisez le Past Simple passif)
questions.reponse: A new school was built in our village. The materials were provided by an NGO.

questions.texte: Rédigez un paragraphe décrivant la sélection des élèves. (Utilisez le Future Simple passif)
questions.reponse: The students will be selected by the headmaster. Classes will begin in September.

questions.texte: Rédigez une conclusion sur l'importance de cette nouvelle école pour la communauté.
questions.reponse: This new school is considered a great opportunity for the children of our village. Education will be provided to more children.
